brief.speaker: carol
brief.text: service:chrono-portal-mirror. Whatever it is, it's logging. Show me everything.

hints.text: Carol: 'Too many. You want only chrono-portal-mirror — service:chrono-portal-mirror.'
Carol: 'There should be six rows. service:chrono-portal-mirror, exact name.'
Carol: 'Query error. service:chrono-portal-mirror — hyphens are fine in values.'

success.speaker: carol
success.text: Portal handshake initiated. Transit window aligned. Key exchange ok. Nothing about a customer, or a request, or a user. We don't deploy services with names like that. Whoever does, doesn't work for us. Or shouldn't.
